title: Braised Algerian Lamb Tagine
description: A hearty North African stew made with tender lamb, sweet and spicy tagine sauce, and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the tagine spice mix, chicken broth, rum, and brown sugar.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender and falling apart.
Stir in the chopped preserved lemon.
Serve the lamb in a tagine or individual bowls.
